---
title: "Who, where, when: The demographic and geographic distribution of bicycle crashes in West Yorkshire"
description: "Robin Lovelace, Hannah Roberts, and Ian Kellar (2016). Who, where, when: The demographic and geographic distribution of bicycle crashes in West Yorkshire. *Transportation Research Part F: Traffic Psychology and Behaviour*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.trf.2015.02.010"
date: "2016-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_who_2016"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Transportation Research Part F: Traffic Psychology and Behaviour"
doi: "10.1016/j.trf.2015.02.010"
publication-url: "http://eprints.whiterose.ac.uk/83930/"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Hannah Roberts"
  - "Ian Kellar"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Transportation Research Part F: Traffic Psychology and Behaviour
**Year:** 2016

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.trf.2015.02.010) [Publisher Link](http://eprints.whiterose.ac.uk/83930/) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace, Hannah Roberts, and Ian Kellar (2016). Who, where, when: The demographic and geographic distribution of bicycle crashes in West Yorkshire. *Transportation Research Part F: Traffic Psychology and Behaviour*. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.trf.2015.02.010

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_who_2016,
  title = {Who, Where, When: The Demographic and Geographic Distribution of Bicycle Crashes in {{West Yorkshire}}},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin and Roberts, Hannah and Kellar, Ian},
  date = {2016},
  journaltitle = {Transportation Research Part F: Traffic Psychology and Behaviour},
  series = {Bicycling and Bicycle Safety},
  volume = {41, Part B},
  issn = {13698478},
  doi = {10.1016/j.trf.2015.02.010},
  url = {http://eprints.whiterose.ac.uk/83930/},
  keywords = {Cycling,Exposure,Geographical factors,Risk,Safety},
  file = {/home/robin/Zotero/storage/8GIWK5II/Lovelace et al. - 2016 - Who, where, when the demographic and geographic d.pdf}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
